textByHash.2a7a6fae49586bd11609ede2aa2743c794e58d0c: I hear you're the one handling the peace talks. You will fail. There is no peace to be had with that man.
textByHash.4b64d5822ac45fc8ce00d165af0746f3ee60a4ea: You should go. Go and be with your loved ones. Hold them close while you can. Soon you will never have that luxury again.
textByHash.cbe85dd550f10209b4b6d5339446f4d61901c4ad: It seems we are to have an election. Know that once I win, our war with humanity will be unlike anything ever seen.
